signals.headline: The Dallas Mavericks defeated the Los Angeles Lakers 134-128 on Sunday, April 5, 2026, with rookie **Cooper Flagg** scor
signals.raw: The Dallas Mavericks defeated the Los Angeles Lakers 134-128 on Sunday, April 5, 2026, with rookie **Cooper Flagg** scoring **45 points**, 9 assists, and 8 rebounds—his second straight 40+ point game (after 51 points), making him the first NBA teenager with back-to-back 40-point outings and the first rookie since Allen Iverson in 1996-97[1][2][3].
